document.source_title: IPL Scenarios: Is Sunrisers Hyderabad match a must-win for Chennai Super Kings?

claims.claim_text: Chennai Super Kings must win their match against Sunrisers Hyderabad to have a chance at the playoffs.
claims.evidence_text: Chennai are in a situation where both their last two matches are must-win fixtures.
